objects.name: client32.ini
objects.description: NetSupport Manager configuration file containing C2 server address.

objects.name: NSM.lic
objects.description: NetSupport Manager license file; observed with licensee 'KAKAN' in EVALUSION cluster.

objects.name: systeminfo.exe
objects.description: Observed as the executed NetSupport client payload in Amatera attack chain.

objects.name: zip archive
objects.description: Archive containing harvested files and standard output from PowerShell-specific commands, exfiltrated to C2.

objects.name: <guid>.txt
objects.description: Text file at the root of exfiltrated zip archive, storing victim device fingerprint in the format <timestamp><computer_name><machine guid>.

objects.name: clr.dll
objects.description: Windows CLR DLL; targeted by PowerShell stage to overwrite 'AmsiScanBuffer' string in memory to disable AMSI scanning.

objects.name: payload.ps1
objects.description: PowerShell script file written to disk and executed as part of Amatera loader functionality.

objects.name: payload.exe
objects.description: Executable file written to disk and executed as part of Amatera loader functionality.

objects.name: Encrypted JPG
objects.description: JPG file downloaded by PowerShell, containing encrypted/compressed NetSupport RAT-laced zip archive.
AES-256 CBC key used in Amatera Stealer C2 communications; 32-byte key stored in payload as a byte array on the stack.
RC2 key used to decrypt encrypted payloads downloaded by the .NET-based downloader packed with Agile.net.

objects.name: Agile.net
objects.description: .NET packer used to pack the downloader for Amatera Stealer.
